instruction: The presentation chart line icon has a yellow sparkle it shouldn't. Get rid of it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/presentation-chart-line.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 3v11.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 6 16.5h2.25M3.75 3h-1.5m1.5 0h16.5m0 0h1.5m-1.5 0v11.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 18 16.5h-2.25m-7.5 0h7.5m-7.5 0-1 3m8.5-3 1 3m0 0 .5 1.5m-.5-1.5h-9.5m0 0-.5 1.5m.75-9 3-3 2.148 2.148A12.061 12.061 0 0 1 16.5 7.605"/></g>
  <polyline id="sparkle" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="20,64 24,60 28,64 24,68 20,64" />
  <polyline id="sparkle" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="20,64 24,60 28,64 24,68 20,64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/presentation-chart-line.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 3v11.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 6 16.5h2.25M3.75 3h-1.5m1.5 0h16.5m0 0h1.5m-1.5 0v11.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 18 16.5h-2.25m-7.5 0h7.5m-7.5 0-1 3m8.5-3 1 3m0 0 .5 1.5m-.5-1.5h-9.5m0 0-.5 1.5m.75-9 3-3 2.148 2.148A12.061 12.061 0 0 1 16.5 7.605"/></g>
</svg>
